title: Unlocked Vulkan and Frame Generation
info: Best for chipsets: mt6989, mt6985, mt6983, mt6897, mt6895. Unlocks Vulkan API and enables frame generation for improved gaming performance.

title: Original Configuration Restoration
info: Best for chipsets: mt6989, mt6985, mt6983, mt6897, mt6895. This configuration restores the original settings in case unlocking Vulkan and enabling frame generation causes any issues.
